verses.1: In the LORD I take refuge. How then can you say to me: “Flee like a bird to your mountain!
verses.2: For behold, the wicked bend their bows. They set their arrow on the string to shoot from the shadows at the upright in heart.
verses.3: If the foundations are destroyed, what can the righteous do?”
verses.4: The LORD is in His holy temple; the LORD is on His heavenly throne. His eyes are watching closely; they examine the sons of men.
verses.5: The LORD tests the righteous and the wicked; His soul hates the lover of violence.
verses.6: On the wicked He will rain down fiery coals and sulfur; a scorching wind will be their portion.
verses.7: For the LORD is righteous; He loves justice. The upright will see His face.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
